overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showing a slow drone-like movement between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers in a futuristic city. The camera moves smoothly along high-rise building exteriors above a city street, showcasing neon signage, dense urban architecture, and a monorail track under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise exterior view from balcony or window ledge

events.description: dark window frame on left side exits field of view as camera moves past the building edge

agents.ego_description: slowly moving forward along the building exterior at high altitude, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: dark structural frame of a window or balcony edge on the left side
tall building with distinctive red and gray paneled facade
cyberpunk skyscraper with purple neon 'KIROSHI' signage and Japanese characters
elevated teal-colored transit track running between buildings
distant street visible at the bottom of the urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The clip opens from a high vantage point partially enclosed by a window frame on the left, looking out at a dense cyberpunk cityscape. The Kiroshi corporation tower dominates the right side with its neon signage, while a red-paneled skyscraper stands opposite. The camera moves slowly forward, and around 10.5 seconds, the window frame exits view, opening the perspective to the aerial corridor.

agents.ego_description: continuing forward movement along the building exterior, maintaining steady observation of the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: Moving through the open aerial corridor between towering structures, the camera reveals more detail of the Kiroshi tower's facade and the adjacent monorail track. The urban canyon narrows as the camera advances, with the street far below showing sparse traffic movement. The lighting remains bright and direct, casting sharp shadows on the building surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon view toward distant city center

agents.ego_description: advancing forward while looking down the length of the city canyon toward the distant skyline

entered.detail: cluster of additional skyscrapers visible at the end of the urban canyon

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues the forward movement through the deep urban canyon, with both the red-paneled skyscraper and Kiroshi tower now appearing closer and more detailed. The view opens toward the distant city center, revealing additional towers on the horizon. The monorail track remains visible running parallel to the camera's path, and the street below continues to show light traffic movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a confined interior vantage point into a vast, open aerial corridor between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. It begins partially enclosed by a window frame on the left, looking out toward the neon signage of the Kiroshi corporation tower and an opposing red-paneled skyscraper. As the camera glides forward, the window frame exits the view, expanding the perspective to reveal the full scale of the urban canyon and a parallel monorail track. The scene then narrows as the camera advances deeper between the structures, casting sharp shadows across the facades while sparse traffic moves on the street far below. Finally, the view opens toward the distant city center, bringing the detailed textures of the surrounding towers into closer focus as the horizon reveals additional skyscrapers under a bright sky.
